ranges.label: Normal Range
ranges.description: Your combined depression, anxiety, and stress scores are within the normal range. Your overall emotional functioning appears healthy. Review your individual subscale scores below for a more detailed picture of each emotional dimension.
suggestions: Continue maintaining healthy lifestyle habits that support emotional well-being
Review individual subscale scores for a more nuanced understanding of your emotional state

ranges.label: Mild to Moderate Distress
ranges.description: Your combined score indicates some level of emotional distress across depression, anxiety, and/or stress dimensions. Review your subscale scores below to identify which area(s) contribute most to your overall distress.
suggestions: Review individual subscale scores to identify primary areas of concern
Practice stress management techniques such as mindfulness, deep breathing, or progressive muscle relaxation
Maintain regular exercise, sleep, and social routines
Consider consulting a mental health professional if any subscale score is elevated

ranges.label: Significant Distress
ranges.description: Your combined score is elevated, indicating significant emotional distress. One or more of your subscale scores is likely in the moderate to severe range. Professional evaluation is recommended to identify appropriate support and intervention.
suggestions: Consult a mental health professional for a comprehensive evaluation
Review individual subscale scores to understand which dimensions need the most attention
Seek evidence-based treatment appropriate to your primary area of difficulty

depression.label: Normal
depression.description: Your depression subscale score is within the normal range. You do not appear to be experiencing significant depressive symptoms such as loss of interest, hopelessness, or lack of meaning.

depression.label: Mild
depression.description: You are experiencing mild depressive symptoms. You may notice some reduction in motivation, enjoyment, or positive outlook. These symptoms are worth monitoring over the coming weeks.

depression.label: Moderate
depression.description: Your score indicates moderate depressive symptoms that may be affecting your daily functioning. You may experience persistent low mood, difficulty finding meaning, or reduced interest in activities. Professional evaluation is recommended.

depression.label: Severe
depression.description: Your depression subscale score is in the severe range, suggesting significant depressive symptoms that are likely impairing your daily functioning and quality of life. Professional help is strongly recommended.

depression.label: Extremely Severe
depression.description: Your depression subscale score is in the extremely severe range. You are likely experiencing profound depressive symptoms including hopelessness, worthlessness, and loss of interest. Immediate professional intervention is essential.

anxiety.label: Normal
anxiety.description: Your anxiety subscale score is within the normal range. You do not appear to be experiencing significant anxiety symptoms such as excessive worry, panic, or physiological arousal.

anxiety.label: Mild
anxiety.description: You are experiencing mild anxiety symptoms. You may notice occasional nervousness, worry, or physical symptoms of anxiety such as a dry mouth or rapid heartbeat. Relaxation techniques may be helpful.

anxiety.label: Moderate
anxiety.description: Your score indicates moderate anxiety symptoms that may be interfering with your comfort and daily activities. You may experience situational panic, persistent worry, or noticeable physical tension. Consider professional evaluation.

anxiety.label: Severe
anxiety.description: Your anxiety subscale score is in the severe range, suggesting significant anxiety that is likely affecting your daily functioning. You may experience frequent worry, panic-like symptoms, or physical manifestations of anxiety. Professional help is recommended.

anxiety.label: Extremely Severe
anxiety.description: Your anxiety subscale score is in the extremely severe range, indicating very high levels of anxiety. You may be experiencing frequent or intense panic, overwhelming worry, or debilitating physical anxiety symptoms. Immediate professional support is strongly recommended.

stress.label: Normal
stress.description: Your stress subscale score is within the normal range. You appear to be managing everyday demands and pressures effectively without excessive tension or irritability.

stress.label: Mild
stress.description: You are experiencing mild stress symptoms. You may find it somewhat difficult to relax, feel occasionally irritable, or notice that you are more easily agitated than usual. Stress management practices may be beneficial.

stress.label: Moderate
stress.description: Your score indicates moderate stress levels that may be affecting your ability to relax and function optimally. You may feel persistently tense, over-reactive, or find it hard to wind down. Consider active stress reduction strategies.

stress.label: Severe
stress.description: Your stress subscale score is in the severe range, suggesting that stress is significantly affecting your well-being. You may feel constantly overwhelmed, easily upset, or unable to tolerate interruptions. Professional support for stress management is recommended.

stress.label: Extremely Severe
stress.description: Your stress subscale score is in the extremely severe range, indicating that you are experiencing very high levels of stress that are likely severely impairing your functioning. You may feel completely overwhelmed, unable to cope, and highly reactive. Immediate professional support is recommended.
